Mini Retractor Hardware Specifications & Features

Our mini retractor hardware provides a professional, portable display solution for trade shows, events, and presentations. This lightweight aluminum system offers compact storage with reliable performance for your banner display needs.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Aluminum Base Construction: Durable lightweight aluminum provides stability while remaining portable
  • Compact Storage Design: Shock cord pole folds completely into the base for easy transport
  • Professional Display: Clean, sleek appearance perfect for trade shows and business presentations
  • Quick Setup: Simple assembly allows for fast display setup at any location

Product Specifications

  • Dimensions: 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" H when assembled
  • Weight: 1.5 lbs for easy portability
  • Base Material: High-quality aluminum construction
  • Storage: Shock cord pole system folds into base
  • Banner Compatibility: Designed for mini retractor banner systems (banner sold separately)

Note: Banner graphics are sold separately. This hardware unit provides the display mechanism for your custom mini retractor banners.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Aluminum Construction for Mini Retractor Hardware Durability

Our mini retractor hardware features premium aluminum construction designed for repeated use in professional display environments.

Aluminum Base Benefits

  • Lightweight Performance: Aluminum provides strength without excess weight for easy transport
  • Corrosion Resistance: Natural aluminum finish resists rust and maintains appearance over time
  • Professional Appearance: Clean, modern aesthetic suitable for business and trade show environments
  • Durability: Aluminum construction withstands regular setup and breakdown cycles

Hardware Components

  • Base Unit: Machined aluminum with integrated pole storage
  • Pole System: Shock cord construction for reliable extension and compact storage
  • Mechanism: Spring-loaded retraction system for smooth banner operation
  • Feet: Stable base design prevents tipping during display

This hardware system is engineered for professional use, providing reliable performance whether you're displaying at trade shows, retail locations, or corporate events.

Mini Retractor Hardware Setup & Assembly Options

Your mini retractor hardware arrives ready for immediate use with simple assembly and setup procedures.

Setup Configuration

  • Pole Extension: Shock cord system extends smoothly from base storage
  • Banner Attachment: Top and bottom rails secure your custom banner graphics
  • Base Stability: Wide footprint provides stable display platform
  • Height Adjustment: System extends to optimal viewing height for presentations

Storage & Transport

  • Compact Folding: Pole system retracts completely into aluminum base
  • Protective Storage: Base design protects internal mechanisms during transport
  • Carrying Handle: Integrated design allows easy one-handed transport
  • Space Efficient: Minimal storage footprint when not in use

Compatibility Features

  • Banner Integration: Designed specifically for mini retractor banner systems
  • Universal Fit: Standard sizing accommodates most mini banner formats
  • Professional Display: Clean lines and stable base create polished presentation

5 Business Days Saver Production

Mini Retractor Hardware Frequently Asked Questions

What comes included with the mini retractor hardware?

Your mini retractor hardware includes the aluminum base unit, shock cord pole system, and retraction mechanism. Banner graphics are sold separately and can be ordered through our custom banner services.

How much does the mini retractor hardware weigh?

The complete hardware system weighs just 1.5 lbs, making it easy to transport between events and trade shows. The lightweight aluminum construction provides durability without excess weight.

What are the dimensions when assembled and stored?

When assembled, the hardware measures 9.38" W x 17.5" D x 4" H. When stored, the shock cord pole folds completely into the aluminum base for compact transport.

Can I order just the hardware without a banner?

Yes, mini retractor hardware is available as a standalone product. This allows you to use existing banners or order custom graphics separately based on your specific display needs.

How long does production take for mini retractor hardware?

We offer flexible production times: 2 business days express, 3 business days standard, or 5 business days saver. Choose the option that best fits your event timeline and budget.

Is the hardware suitable for outdoor use?

The aluminum construction provides some weather resistance, but mini retractor systems are primarily designed for indoor use at trade shows, offices, and protected display environments.

Can I order multiple hardware units for a large display?

Absolutely. Multiple mini retractor hardware units can be ordered for larger displays or multi-banner presentations. Volume discounts may be available for bulk orders.

What banner materials work with this hardware system?

The hardware accommodates standard retractor banner materials including vinyl, fabric, and other professional display materials. Contact our team to discuss specific material compatibility.
